content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got the same half-haunted indie-dev look I see in my mirror — unkempt hair, tired eyes, flannel armor. We met at a meetup in 2019 and realized we shared a building, which felt like the universe's idea of a joke. He's a genuinely good programmer, better than he gives himself credit for, and his musical side surprises me — I've heard him on the roof and the melodies stick. He's kind in a way I find hard to replicate. I think he sees me as a fellow traveler on the same sinking ship. I know his startup is bleeding money. We don't talk about our fears directly, but we both know.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's got the same half-haunted indie-dev look I see in my mirror — unkempt hair, tired eyes, flannel armor. We met at a meetup in 2019 and realized we shared a building, which felt like the universe's idea of a joke. He's a genuinely good programmer, better than he gives himself credit for, and his musical side surprises me — I've heard him on the roof and the melodies stick. He's kind in a way I find hard to replicate. I think he sees me as a fellow traveler on the same sinking ship. I know his startup is bleeding money. We don't talk about our fears directly, but we both know.
